title: About Neevalay Tots
text:
Neevalay Tots is a research-driven, global preschool in New Delhi with the promise
"Nurturing Roots, Shaping the Future." The name comes from the Sanskrit words
*Neev* (foundation) and *Alay* (home) — a home where strong foundations are built.
We believe strong foundations shape strong futures, and our goal is to raise
confident thinkers, creators and communicators — not children who simply memorise.

title: Our Approach and Philosophy
text:
Our approach is child-centric and research-driven, inspired by the Montessori and
Reggio Emilia methodologies. Learning is playful, hands-on and led by each child's
natural curiosity, within a warm and emotionally safe environment. Our work rests
on six pillars:
- Research-Driven — practices grounded in early-childhood research
- Emotionally Nurturing — a caring, secure space where every child feels valued
- Global Pedagogy — internationally informed early-learning methods
- Child-Centric — learning paced to each child's development
- Technology-Integrated — thoughtful, age-appropriate use of technology
- Professionally Managed — run with structure, care and accountability

title: Programmes and Age Groups
text:
Neevalay Tots offers programmes for children from about 2 to 8 years:
- Playgroup — ages 2 to 3 years
- Nursery — ages 3 to 4 years
- Kindergarten 1 (KG1) — ages 4 to 5 years
- Kindergarten 2 (KG2) — ages 5 to 6 years
- Daycare — flexible care for ages 2 to 6 years
- Enrichment Programmes — ages 3 to 8 years
The best way to choose the right programme for your child is to speak with our team
or visit us — we're happy to guide you.

title: Daycare
text:
Our Daycare offers flexible, nurturing care for children aged 2 to 6 years,
designed to support working parents while keeping learning and play going through
the day. For current daycare timings, plans and availability, please contact our
team — we'll be glad to help.

title: Enrichment Programmes
text:
Beyond the core curriculum, Neevalay Tots offers enrichment across 20+ domains for
children aged 3 to 8 — including STEM, music, art, yoga, chess and coding — to help
children explore their interests and build new skills. Ask us which enrichment
options are currently running and how to enrol.

title: Timings and Location
text:
We are located in New Delhi and are open Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM.
For our exact address and directions, or to plan your visit, please reach out on
WhatsApp or call us — we'll share everything and help you find us easily.

title: Admissions and Booking a Visit
text:
We'd love to welcome your family to Neevalay Tots. The easiest way to begin is to
book a visit or send us an enquiry — our team will walk you through our programmes,
answer your questions, and guide you through the simple admission steps.
- WhatsApp or call us to book a campus visit
- Apply any time through our admission form: https://neevalay.com/admission-form.html
- For general questions, use our contact form: https://neevalay.com/contact.html
Seeing the environment and meeting our educators in person is the best way to know
if Neevalay is right for your child.

title: Fees
text:
Our fee structure depends on the programme and the schedule you choose. For the
most accurate, up-to-date fees and any current offers, please contact our team on
WhatsApp or by phone — we'll happily share the details and help you plan.

title: Safety, Care and Wellbeing
text:
Your child's safety and emotional wellbeing are at the heart of everything we do.
We maintain a warm, secure and hygienic environment and are always happy to walk
you through our safety practices, our educators, and how we care for children day
to day — the best way to see this is during a campus visit.

title: A Nurturing Day
text:
Days at Neevalay blend play, exploration and gentle routine. Children learn through
hands-on activities, stories, music, movement and free play, supported by caring
educators who follow each child's pace. To experience a typical day and our
classrooms first-hand, we warmly invite you to visit us.

title: Settling In and Common Questions
text:
Starting preschool is a big step, and we support every family through it:
- Separation anxiety is completely normal — our educators gently help new children
 settle in at their own pace.
- We partner closely with parents and keep you updated about your child's day.
- For questions about toilet training, meals, nap time, a child who is unwell, or
 anything specific to your child, our team is happy to talk it through with you.
If your child has a specific health condition or need, please speak with our team
directly so we can support them well.

title: Contact Us
text:
We're here to help and would love to hear from you:
- WhatsApp / Phone: +91 97117 52584
- Email: hello@neevalay.com
- Contact form: https://neevalay.com/contact.html
- Admission form: https://neevalay.com/admission-form.html

The quickest way to get answers or book a visit is to message us on WhatsApp.
